emails.body: Re: California in the Dark CERA Alert We're a client, so I'm assuming internally we have access codes for folks to use. I'm trying to get one. Worry not; I'll track it down. Thanks very much for the info. Best, Jeff

emails.body: Jeff In the dark ages when I first signed up I think I went through Elizabeth Linnell for access code. I tracked down these websites. Perhaps they will help. But first I'd go through Elizabeth's group! <URL> <URL> Lora Sullivan Federal Government Affairs Representative Enron 1775 Eye Street, NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20006 202-466-9142 202-828-3372 (fax) email: lora.sullivan@enron.com Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 03/20/2001 11:30 AM
